# Onboarding: doc-qa skill

This guide helps new contributors use and extend the doc-qa skill.

## Quickstart

- Read SKILL.md for doc linting and QA procedures.

- Use tools in the tools/ directory for markdown and link validation.

- See examples/README.md for usage patterns.

## Integration patterns

- Use with prompt-engineering and prompt-authoring for doc linting.

- Combine with validation for CI gates.

## FAQ

- Q: How do I check for broken links?
  A: Use the link checker in tools/ or run the validation script in examples/README.md.

## Gotchas

- Always run doc-qa before merging doc changes.
